sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63753" key="logoi+atrei/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λογο-ϊατρεία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n63753.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">healing only in words</tr_>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">λογίατρος</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
